purpose: Renders the Leave Group trigger and handles the leave confirmation flow, including blocking the sole admin from leaving until they promote another member.

public_api.name: isSoleAdmin
public_api.signature: function isSoleAdmin(adminPubkeys: string[] | undefined, ownPubkeyHex: string | null | undefined): boolean
public_api.description: Pure predicate. Returns true when ownPubkeyHex is the sole entry in adminPubkeys (case-insensitive). Exported for unit testing.

public_api.name: LeaveGroupButton
public_api.signature: function LeaveGroupButton({ groupId, adminPubkeys?, ownPubkeyHex? }: LeaveGroupButtonProps): JSX.Element
public_api.description: Default export. Renders the Leave Group button and modal. When isSoleAdmin is true, shows the blocked-explanation modal instead of the confirmation modal.
